g.text: Visualize the frequency distribution of a frame.
Calculates the Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) of the image rows/columns to identify spikes that may
indicate the native resolution or scaling artifacts.
Path to the source material to analyze. Supports videos, images, or
VapourSynth scripts. For scripts, the first output is used.
Cull the sides/top of the frame to focus on the center.
Radius for finding peaks/spikes in the frequency plot.
The specific frame number to extract and analyze from video inputs. Ignored
The VapourSynth indexer used to load files.
Specifying the plugin namespace is also allowed (e.g., 'bs').
